current_scorecard.title: AI Meets the Classroom: When Do Large Language Models Harm Learning?
current_scorecard.authors_full: Matthias Lehmann, Philipp B. Cornelius, Fabian J. Sting
current_scorecard.setting_detail: Netherlands (Study 1) and Germany (Studies 2, 3); university students, Python programming
current_scorecard.study_design: Mixed (Study 1: quasi-experimental FE2SLS with outages as IV; Studies 2, 3: RCT)
current_scorecard.incentives: Course grade (Study 1); €10 fixed + €1 per correct post-test answer (Studies 2-3)
